question_X: Do you like to BBQ?
answer_Y: I love to bbq

answer_Y: My dog is my best friend.

answer_Y: Several of my neighbors remember me in diapers.

answer_Y: Oh I love scary movies.

answer_Y: It's nice having them nearby.

answer_Y: I've lived here forever.

answer_Y: I moved here from the counrty

answer_Y: I love my music

answer_Y: I'm vegan.

answer_Y: I don't know who bought that one but it was't me.

answer_Y_cz: Na filmu v kině jsem nebyl už celá léta.
